controls.title: User ID Management
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires unique user identification and management to ensure accountability for actions on ePHI
controls.recommendation: Implement unique user IDs for all workforce members with automated provisioning and deprovisioning aligned to employment status

controls.title: Emergency Access Procedures
controls.rationale: Establish procedures for emergency access to ePHI when normal mechanisms are unavailable
controls.recommendation: Define emergency access procedures with audit logging and periodic testing

controls.title: Automatic Logoff
controls.rationale: Prevent unauthorized access to unattended workstations
controls.recommendation: Configure automatic session termination after defined inactivity period

controls.title: Encryption and Decryption
controls.rationale: Protect ePHI using encryption mechanisms at rest and in transit
controls.recommendation: Enable encryption for all storage, databases, and transmissions using FIPS 140-2 validated algorithms

controls.title: Audit Controls
controls.rationale: Record and examine activity containing ePHI
controls.recommendation: Implement comprehensive audit logs for all ePHI access and modifications with retention per policy

controls.title: Risk Analysis
controls.rationale: Conduct comprehensive risk analysis to identify vulnerabilities
controls.recommendation: Perform annual risk assessments documenting threats, vulnerabilities, and mitigations

controls.title: Risk Management Plan
controls.rationale: Implement safeguards to reduce identified risks
controls.recommendation: Document and implement mitigations for all identified risks with ownership and timelines

controls.title: Workforce Authorization
controls.rationale: Grant access only to authorized workforce members
controls.recommendation: Implement role-based access control with principle of least privilege

controls.title: Workforce Supervision
controls.rationale: Oversee workforce member access to ePHI
controls.recommendation: Conduct periodic access reviews and investigate unauthorized access attempts

controls.title: Change Documentation
controls.rationale: Document all system changes for compliance and troubleshooting
controls.recommendation: Maintain change logs with before/after config and approvals

controls.title: Business Associate Agreements
controls.rationale: Ensure third-party processors handle ePHI appropriately
controls.recommendation: Require signed Business Associate Agreements from all vendors processing ePHI

controls.title: Audit Controls for Audit Logs
controls.rationale: Protect audit logs from alteration and loss
controls.recommendation: Implement immutable audit log storage with tamper detection

controls.title: Integrity Authentication Mechanisms
controls.rationale: Ensure ePHI has not been altered or destroyed
controls.recommendation: Implement cryptographic integrity controls such as digital signatures or checksums

controls.title: Encryption for Transmission
controls.rationale: Protect ePHI during electronic transmission
controls.recommendation: Use TLS 1.2+ for all internet transmissions; implement VPN for internal traffic

controls.title: Sanction Policy
controls.rationale: Establish consequences for security policy violations
controls.recommendation: Document discipline procedures and apply consistently to workforce members

controls.title: Evaluation and Documentation
controls.rationale: Periodically assess security effectiveness
controls.recommendation: Conduct annual compliance evaluations and document remediation

controls.title: Access Control Mechanisms
controls.rationale: Limit access to ePHI to authorized persons
controls.recommendation: Implement role-based access control with MFA enforcement

controls.title: Facility Access Controls
controls.rationale: Limit physical access to systems containing ePHI
controls.recommendation: Document access authorization procedures and implement access logging

controls.title: Security Incident Procedures
controls.rationale: Identify, contain, and eliminate security incidents
controls.recommendation: Establish incident response procedures with investigation, documentation, and mitigation

controls.title: Security Awareness and Training
controls.rationale: Ensure workforce understands security policies and procedures
controls.recommendation: Provide annual security training to all workforce members with documentation

controls.title: AI Services Access Protection
controls.rationale: AI accounts processing ePHI must enforce network isolation and encryption.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK encryption on AI accounts.

controls.title: ML Workspace Network Encryption
controls.rationale: ML workspaces processing ePHI must use private endpoints.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints.

controls.title: Resource Group Integrity Controls
controls.rationale: Resource groups must be tagged for ePHI scope tracking.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory tags to all resource groups.

controls.title: Storage Account ePHI Protection
controls.rationale: Storage accounts holding ePHI must enforce encryption, soft delete, and network isolation.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only, soft delete, and configure firewall rules.

controls.title: Cosmos DB ePHI Encryption
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB storing ePHI must disable local auth and use CMK encryption.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Enable CMK encryption. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Database Server ePHI Protection
controls.rationale: Database servers processing ePHI must disable public access and enable HA.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable zone-redundant HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Container Registry ePHI Image Security
controls.rationale: Container registries in ePHI environments must disable admin access.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable content trust. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: API Gateway Transmission Security
controls.rationale: API gateways must enforce TLS 1.2 and WAF for ePHI transmission.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF in Prevention mode. Disable legacy TLS.

controls.title: Storage Container ePHI Access Control
controls.rationale: Storage containers with ePHI must not allow anonymous public access.
controls.recommendation: Set container access to Private. Configure lifecycle and immutability policies.

controls.title: SQL Server ePHI Audit Controls
controls.rationale: SQL Servers storing ePHI must have ATP, per-database auditing, and TDE.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP. Verify per-database auditing. Check TDE on all databases.

controls.title: Web Application Authentication for ePHI
controls.rationale: Web Apps accessing ePHI must enable authentication and restrict access.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Auth. Restrict CORS. Configure IP restrictions.

controls.title: Database Server ePHI Audit Configuration
controls.rationale: Database servers must enforce secure transport and audit logging for ePHI.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Security Incident Procedures
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires procedures for detecting and reporting security incidents involving ePHI.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender plans and configure alert rules for ePHI security incidents.

controls.title: Response and Reporting
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires breach notification to affected individuals and HHS within 60 days.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups and security contacts for breach notification.

controls.title: Security Contact Configuration
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be configured for incident reporting and breach notification.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with email and alert notifications.

controls.title: Contingency Plan
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires contingency plans for ePHI data backup and recovery.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults and configure backup for ePHI systems.

controls.title: Data Backup Plan
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires retrievable exact copies of ePHI with geo-redundancy.
controls.recommendation: Use geo-redundant storage for ePHI data.

controls.title: Testing and Revision Procedures
controls.rationale: Database resilience must be verified for ePHI recovery.
controls.recommendation: Enable HA and geo-replication for databases hosting ePHI.

controls.title: Configuration Change Management
controls.rationale: Changes to ePHI systems must be controlled and documented.
controls.recommendation: Assign Azure policies to enforce change governance.

controls.title: Device and Media Controls
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires inventory and control of hardware and electronic media containing ePHI.
controls.recommendation: Maintain comprehensive asset inventory with data classification.

controls.title: Security Awareness Training
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires security awareness training for all workforce members.
controls.recommendation: Configure Terms of Use and enforce security policy acknowledgement.

controls.title: Session Controls
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires session management to prevent unauthorized access to ePHI.
controls.recommendation: Configure CA policies with sign-in frequency and session termination.

controls.title: Log Retention for ePHI
controls.rationale: HIPAA requires retention of audit logs for ePHI access for minimum 6 years.
controls.recommendation: Set Log Analytics retention to meet HIPAA 6-year requirement.
